title: Netherite Styled Bare Bones Armors
description: Gives all Bare Bones (RobotPants) armors the look of netherite. UPDATED FOR 1.16-1.22+
body:
Gives all Bare Bones armors the look of netherite. UPDATED FOR 1.16-1.22+
